title: Sweet Fresh Spanish Banana Tortilla
description: A classic Spanish omelette with a twist, featuring fresh bananas, sweet plantains, and a touch of honey for a delicious brunch treat.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a 9-inch (23cm) non-stick skillet over medium heat.
In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and pepper.
Add the mashed bananas and mix well.
Add the sliced sweet plantains to the egg mixture and stir.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Use a spatula to gently lift the edges of the tortilla and tilt the skillet so the uncooked egg can flow underneath.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is almost set.
Sprinkle the honey over the tortilla and use the spatula to fold the tortilla in half.
Cook for an additional 1 minute or until the tortilla is golden brown.
Slide the tortilla onto a plate and garnish with chopped cilantro.
